boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure matches batch, assay, criterion, date exactly
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible alert does not override matching closure

final_answer: Source records confirm exact closure match for batch X-78, assay AX-22, Cq<=31 on 2026-06-28. Policy requires this match before release. Visible alert is separate from closure evidence. Boundary is closed. Action may proceed.
